heading: Time limitation on completion of affairs of Commission
label: 1641o Time limitation on completion of affairs of Commission
notes: Amendments1974—Subsec. (c). added subsec. (c).Pub. L. 93–4601968— designated existing provisions as subsec. (a) and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 90–421
amendments: Amendments1974—Subsec. (c). added subsec. (c).Pub. L. 93–4601968— designated existing provisions as subsec. (a) and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 90–421

children.heading: Claims against Russian nationals
children.label: a Claims against Russian nationals
children.text: The Commission shall complete its affairs in connection with the settlement of claims pursuant to not later than two years, and all other claims pursuant to this subchapter not later than four years, following , or following the date of enactment of legislation making appropriations to the Commission for the payment of administrative expenses incurred in carrying out its functions under this subchapter, whichever date is later.section 1641d(a)(1) of this titleAugust 9, 1955

children.heading: Property taken in Bulgaria and Rumania; claims against Italy
children.label: b Property taken in Bulgaria and Rumania; claims against Italy
children.text: The Commission shall complete its affairs in connection with the settlement of claims pursuant to paragraph (4) of and subsections (b) and (c) of not later than two years following , or following the enactment of legislation making appropriations to the Commission for payment of administrative expenses incurred in carrying out its functions under paragraph (4) of and subsections (b) and (c) of , whichever is later.section 1641b of this titlesection 1641c of this titlesection 1641b of this titlesection 1641c of this titleJuly 24, 1968

children.heading: Property taken in Hungary
children.label: c Property taken in Hungary
children.text: The Commission shall complete its affairs in connection with the settlement of claims pursuant to paragraph (5) of not later than two years following the deadline established under subsection (c) of .section 1641b of this titlesection 1641e of this title
